description: The currently displayed image is an irrelevant non-scientific icon, which contains a two-color (cyan and yellow) circular ring, a red bookmark shape inside the ring, and the text "Check for updates" below the pattern. No valid scientific content related to the research on near-rapidly solidified Fe-20Mn-9Al-1.2C-xCr low-density steels, such as microstructure characterization images, mechanical property curves, phase analysis results, or material processing flow diagrams, can be identified from this image. No information supporting the core conclusions about the effects of Cr addition on the microstructure, mechanical properties and deformation behavior of the studied steels can be extracted from the provided invalid image.
